title: Valkyrien Engines
description: Engines for faster Valkyrien Skies (water) ships
body:
# Valkyrien Engines
Adding simple engines to make Valkyrien ships go faster

The engines only work if they are less than 5 blocks above the water level

The engines are additive, more of them will make your ship faster

currently we have:
- Solar Engine (generates the equivelant of a normal engines power, when it can see the sky and it is day)
- Powered Engine (generates 3 times that of a normal engine, requires 10E/t right now)
